tools.name: atlassian_call_mcp_tool
tools.description: Call an allowlisted upstream Atlassian MCP tool with this Slack user's connected Jira identity.

arguments.description: JSON arguments for the upstream MCP tool

tools.name: atlassian_list_mcp_tools
tools.description: List allowed tool metadata advertised by the upstream Atlassian MCP server for this Slack user's connected Jira account.

tools.name: github_add_labels
tools.description: Add labels to a GitHub issue or pull request.

tools.name: github_call_mcp_tool
tools.description: Call any official or GitHub-namespaced tool advertised by the centralized MCP gateway with this user's connected GitHub identity.

name.description: Exact official or GitHub-prefixed MCP tool name returned by github.listMcpTools

arguments.description: JSON arguments matching the discovered upstream tool schema

tools.name: github_close_issue
tools.description: Close a GitHub issue. Use only when explicitly requested.

tools.name: github_comment_on_issue_or_pr
tools.description: Add a comment to a GitHub issue or pull request using this Slack user's connected GitHub account.

tools.name: github_create_branch
tools.description: Create a GitHub branch from another branch or the repository default branch.

fromRef.description: Optional source branch. Defaults to repository default branch.

tools.name: github_create_issue
tools.description: Create a GitHub issue visible to this Slack user's connected GitHub account.

tools.name: github_create_or_update_file
tools.description: Create or update a single GitHub repository file. For updates, pass the file SHA from github_get_file.

tools.name: github_create_pr
tools.description: Open a pull request from an existing branch using this Slack user's connected GitHub account.

draft.description: Whether to create a draft PR

tools.name: github_get_authenticated_user
tools.description: Return the GitHub identity connected to this Slack user.

tools.name: github_get_file
tools.description: Read a text file from a GitHub repository. Use before updating an existing file.

ref.description: Optional branch, tag, or commit SHA

tools.name: github_get_issue
tools.description: Get a GitHub issue by repository and issue number. Use before editing issue metadata.

tools.name: github_get_pr
tools.description: Get a GitHub pull request by repository and PR number. Use before editing PR metadata.

tools.name: github_list_assigned_issues
tools.description: List GitHub issues assigned to this Slack user.

tools.name: github_list_mcp_tools
tools.description: List all GitHub tools currently advertised by the centralized MCP gateway for this user.

tools.name: github_list_my_pull_requests
tools.description: List GitHub pull requests authored by this Slack user's connected GitHub account. Defaults to open PRs sorted by most recently updated.

limit.description: Maximum number of pull requests to return. Defaults to 10.

state.description: Pull request state to include. Defaults to open.

owner.description: Optional GitHub owner or organization login, for example example-org.

repo.description: Optional repository in owner/name format. Takes precedence over owner.

tools.name: github_remove_labels
tools.description: Remove labels from a GitHub issue or pull request.

tools.name: github_reopen_issue
tools.description: Reopen a GitHub issue. Use only when explicitly requested.

tools.name: github_request_review
tools.description: Request users or teams to review a GitHub pull request.

tools.name: github_search_issues
tools.description: Search GitHub issues and pull requests visible to this Slack user's connected GitHub account.

tools.name: github_update_issue
tools.description: Update GitHub issue metadata only: title, body, state, labels, or assignees.

tools.name: github_update_pr
tools.description: Update pull request metadata only: title, body, base branch, or draft state.

tools.name: gmail_create_draft
tools.description: Create a Gmail draft only. This does not send email and should be used before any user-reviewed send workflow.

tools.name: google_analytics_get_metadata
tools.description: List available Google Analytics dimensions and metrics for a GA4 property, optionally filtered by search terms.

propertyId.description: GA4 property ID, either numeric or properties/{id}.

tools.name: google_analytics_list_properties
tools.description: List Google Analytics accounts and GA4 properties visible to this Slack user's connected Google account.

tools.name: google_analytics_run_report
tools.description: Run a read-only GA4 report for a Google Analytics property using selected dimensions, metrics, and a date range of at most 366 days.

propertyId.description: GA4 property ID, either numeric or properties/{id}.

metrics.description: GA4 metric API names, such as activeUsers or sessions.

dimensions.description: Optional GA4 dimension API names, such as country or date.

tools.name: google_append_to_drive_text_file
tools.description: Append text to a Google Drive text file accessible to the connected Google account and granted Drive scopes by reading existing content then replacing it.

mimeType.description: Optional MIME type. Defaults to text/plain.

tools.name: google_create_calendar_event
tools.description: Create a Google Calendar event. Use only when clearly requested.

tools.name: google_create_drive_folder
tools.description: Create a Google Drive folder using this Slack user's Google account.

tools.name: google_create_drive_text_file
tools.description: Create a new app-owned plain/text-like file in Google Drive using this Slack user's connected Google account. Do not use this to create Google Docs, Sheets, or Slides; use dedicated tools for those file types.

text.description: Text body to write into the file. Defaults to an empty text file.

mimeType.description: Optional non-Google-Workspace MIME type. Defaults to text/plain.

tools.name: google_docs_create_document
tools.description: Create a Google Docs document from plain text or Markdown content by importing it into Google Drive as a Google Workspace document. Use this for explicit requests to convert text or Markdown into a Google Doc.

text.description: Text or Markdown body to import. Defaults to an empty document.

sourceMimeType.description: Source content MIME type. Defaults to text/markdown; use text/plain for plain text.

tools.name: google_get_authenticated_user
tools.description: Return the Google identity connected to this Slack user.

tools.name: google_get_drive_file
tools.description: Read Google Drive file metadata and, by default, text content for files accessible to the connected Google account and granted Drive scopes. Drive metadata search may find files whose content cannot be read or edited if the stored Google connection lacks the required Drive scope or the file is not shared with the connected account.

includeContent.description: Whether to include exported/downloaded text content. Defaults to true.

mimeType.description: Optional Drive MIME type hint from search results. Used to choose the safest MCP-GW export format.

exportMimeType.description: Optional explicit export MIME type override for Google Workspace files.

tools.name: google_list_shared_drives
tools.description: List Shared Drives visible to this Slack user's connected Google account. Use this when the user asks for Shared Drives or Team Drives; Google Drive file search only searches files and folders.

tools.name: google_move_drive_file
tools.description: Move a Google Drive file accessible to the connected Google account and granted Drive scopes into a folder. Does not delete the file.

removeParentIds.description: Optional parent IDs to remove. Defaults to current parents.

tools.name: google_search_calendar_events
tools.description: Search upcoming Google Calendar events visible to this Slack user's connected Google account.

timeMin.description: Optional RFC3339 lower bound; defaults to now

tools.name: google_search_drive_files
tools.description: Search Google Drive files visible to this Slack user's connected Google account. This is the single file search/list tool for My Drive-visible files, Shared with me, and Shared Drives. Use scope=shared_with_me for Google Drive's Shared with me area; use scope=all_shared_drives for files inside all Shared Drives; use scope=shared_drive with sharedDriveId or sharedDriveName for one Shared Drive. Shared with me folders are not Shared Drives: first find the folder with scope=shared_with_me, then call this tool again with parentId to list that folder's contents. Use mimeType application/vnd.google-apps.document when the user asks for Google Docs.

scope.description: Search scope. all is the default broad visible-file search. shared_with_me lists files/folders directly shared with the user. shared_drive searches one Shared Drive by sharedDriveId or sharedDriveName. all_shared_drives searches every visible Shared Drive.

sharedDriveId.description: Optional Shared Drive id returned by google.listSharedDrives. When set, search is scoped to that Shared Drive.

sharedDriveName.description: Optional Shared Drive name filter for scope=shared_drive or scope=all_shared_drives.

parentId.description: Optional folder id. When set, search is scoped to direct children of that folder.

sharedWithMe.description: Set true to search files and folders in Google Drive's Shared with me area. This is different from Shared Drives.

mimeType.description: Optional exact MIME type filter, such as application/vnd.google-apps.document for Google Docs.

tools.name: google_search_mail_messages
tools.description: Search Gmail messages visible to this Slack user's connected Google account.

tools.name: google_slides_copy_presentation
tools.description: Copy an existing Google Slides presentation into a new presentation using the connected Google account. Use this for explicit user requests to create a new deck from a template; it does not edit slide contents.

tools.name: google_slides_create_slide
tools.description: Create a new slide in an existing Google Slides presentation, optionally from a layout or predefined layout, and optionally fill placeholders on the created slide. Use this for explicit user requests to add a slide to a deck.

presentationId.description: Google Slides presentation ID to edit.

objectId.description: Optional caller-supplied object ID for the new slide.

insertionIndex.description: Optional zero-based insertion index. Use 2 to create slide 3.

layoutObjectId.description: Optional layout object ID from google_slides_get_presentation or google_slides_probe_template.

predefinedLayout.description: Optional Google predefined layout such as TITLE_AND_BODY or TITLE_AND_TWO_COLUMNS.

replacements.description: Optional placeholder text replacements to apply to the created slide.

placeholderType.description: Google Slides placeholder type such as TITLE, SUBTITLE, BODY, CENTERED_TITLE, or SLIDE_NUMBER.

text.description: Text to place into the placeholder.

index.description: Optional placeholder index when a slide has multiple placeholders of the same type.

placeholderType.description: Compatibility top-level placeholder type alias normalized by the Google Slides provider.

text.description: Compatibility top-level placeholder text alias normalized by the Google Slides provider.

title.description: Compatibility title text alias normalized by the Google Slides provider.

subtitle.description: Compatibility subtitle text alias normalized by the Google Slides provider.

body.description: Compatibility body text alias normalized by the Google Slides provider.

tools.name: google_slides_fill_placeholders
tools.description: Fill text placeholders on an existing Google Slides presentation slide. When slideObjectId is omitted, Burble chooses the slide that best matches the requested placeholders. Use for explicit user requests to set title, subtitle, body, or similar placeholder text in a deck.

presentationId.description: Google Slides presentation ID to edit.

slideObjectId.description: Optional slide object ID. If omitted, Burble chooses the slide that best matches the requested placeholders.

placeholderType.description: Google Slides placeholder type such as TITLE, SUBTITLE, BODY, CENTERED_TITLE, or SLIDE_NUMBER.

text.description: Text to place into the placeholder.

index.description: Optional placeholder index when a slide has multiple placeholders of the same type.

placeholderType.description: Compatibility top-level placeholder type alias normalized by the Google Slides provider.

text.description: Compatibility top-level placeholder text alias normalized by the Google Slides provider.

index.description: Compatibility top-level placeholder index alias normalized by the Google Slides provider.

title.description: Compatibility title text alias normalized by the Google Slides provider.

subtitle.description: Compatibility subtitle text alias normalized by the Google Slides provider.

body.description: Compatibility body text alias normalized by the Google Slides provider.

tools.name: google_slides_get_presentation
tools.description: Read sanitized structure, slide text, layout IDs, and placeholder metadata from a Google Slides presentation.

includeSlides.description: Whether to include slide content. Defaults to true.

tools.name: google_slides_probe_template
tools.description: Probe a Google Slides presentation's layouts and placeholders into a manifest for future deterministic slide rendering.

presentationId.description: Google Slides presentation ID to inspect as a template.

tools.name: google_slides_search_presentations
tools.description: Search Google Slides presentations visible to this Slack user's connected Google account.

tools.name: google_update_calendar_event
tools.description: Update Google Calendar event metadata or start/end time. Does not delete events.

tools.name: google_update_drive_text_file
tools.description: Replace the content of a Google Drive text file accessible to the connected Google account and granted Drive scopes. Use google_get_drive_file first when preserving existing content matters.

mimeType.description: Optional MIME type. Defaults to text/plain.

tools.name: hubspot_get_authenticated_user
tools.description: Return the HubSpot account and user connected to this Slack user.

tools.name: hubspot_list_owners
tools.description: List HubSpot CRM owners/users assignable to CRM records.

tools.name: hubspot_list_users
tools.description: List users in the connected HubSpot account when the account granted the settings.users.read scope.

tools.name: hubspot_read_api_resource
tools.description: Read a HubSpot API resource with GET for less common read-only scopes when no first-class HubSpot tool exists. The path must be a HubSpot API path, for example /crm/v3/schemas/deals or /marketing/v3/campaigns.

tools.name: hubspot_search_companies
tools.description: Search HubSpot CRM companies visible to this Slack user's connected HubSpot account.

tools.name: hubspot_search_contacts
tools.description: Search HubSpot CRM contacts visible to this Slack user's connected HubSpot account.

tools.name: hubspot_search_crm_objects
tools.description: Search or list HubSpot CRM objects covered by the connected account's read scopes. Use this for HubSpot object types beyond contacts, companies and deals, and for recent CRM object requests without a keyword query.

objectType.description: HubSpot CRM object type to read

query.description: Optional search terms. Omit for most-recent records.

properties.description: Optional HubSpot property names to include

tools.name: hubspot_search_deals
tools.description: Search HubSpot CRM deals visible to this Slack user's connected HubSpot account.

tools.name: jira_add_comment
tools.description: Add a plain-text comment to a Jira issue.

tools.name: jira_add_labels
tools.description: Add labels to a Jira issue.

tools.name: jira_create_issue
tools.description: Create a Jira issue via Jira REST with this Slack user's connected Jira account. Use after confirming project and issue type.

assigneeAccountId.description: Optional Jira account ID for the assignee

tools.name: jira_create_subtask
tools.description: Create a Jira subtask under an existing parent issue. Confirm the subtask issue type first when possible.

tools.name: jira_edit_issue
tools.description: Edit Jira issue fields via Jira REST with this Slack user's connected Jira account.

assigneeAccountId.description: Jira account ID for assignee, or null to unassign

tools.name: jira_get_authenticated_user
tools.description: Return the Jira identity connected to this Slack user.

tools.name: jira_get_issue
tools.description: Get a Jira issue by key, including summary, status, labels, and text description.

tools.name: jira_link_issues
tools.description: Create a Jira issue link between two issues.

typeName.description: Jira issue link type name. Defaults to Relates.

tools.name: jira_list_accessible_resources
tools.description: List Atlassian resources visible to this Slack user's connected Jira account. Use the resource url as Jira MCP cloudId for the Atlassian Rovo MCP server.

tools.name: jira_list_assigned_issues
tools.description: List Jira issues assigned to this Slack user.

tools.name: jira_list_visible_projects
tools.description: List Jira projects visible to this Slack user's connected Jira account. Use query='DM', action='create', and expandIssueTypes=true to confirm create access and issue types before creating a Jira issue.

query.description: Optional project key or name search

action.description: Optional Jira project action permission filter

expandIssueTypes.description: Whether to include project issue types

tools.name: jira_remove_labels
tools.description: Remove labels from a Jira issue.

tools.name: jira_search_issues
tools.description: Search Jira issues visible to this Slack user's connected Jira account.

tools.name: jira_search_users
tools.description: Search Jira users visible to this Slack user's connected Jira account. Use this to resolve assignee account IDs from emails or names.

query.description: Jira user email, display name, or query

tools.name: jira_transition_issue
tools.description: Transition a Jira issue by transition id or by matching available transition name.

tools.name: jira_update_issue
tools.description: Update Jira issue fields: summary, description, assignee, or full labels set.

assigneeAccountId.description: Jira account ID for assignee, or null to unassign

tools.name: slack_search_messages
tools.description: Search Slack messages visible to this Slack user's connected Slack search token.

fromUserId.description: Optional Slack user ID to filter by author

inChannel.description: Optional channel name without #, or channel ID

tools.name: slack_search_users
tools.description: Search Slack users by display name, real name, username, or Slack user ID.

query.description: Slack user name, display name, or ID

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search public web/news sources for current information. Use this before web_extract when the user asks for latest, fresh, current, or news items and does not provide specific URLs.

limit.description: Maximum number of search results. Defaults to 5.
